relationships: ber:Tom yuɣal-d seg uɣerbaz s axxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Tom yennum yetteddu seg umahil ɣer uxxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Tikkal, Tom yetteddu ɣef uḍar seg umahil ɣer uxxam
ber:Tom qrib dima yetteddu ɣef uḍar ɣer umahil
ber:Tom qrib dima yetteddu ɣer umahil ɣef uḍar
ber:Qrib werǧin ttedduɣ ɣer umahil ɣef uḍar
ber:Qrib dima ttedduɣ ɣer umahil ɣef uḍar
ber:Tenna-d tebɣa ad tuɣal s axxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Ziri seg zik i yettṛuḥu s axxam ɣef uḍar
ber:S umata, Tom mačči ɣef uḍar i yettṛuḥu ɣer tzeqqa n waddal
